reviews.name: LYNN KUNIHIRA AKKY
reviews.text: All my children have gone through Sir Apollo Kaggwa P/S Mengo and I don't regret it at all. They brought the best out of them. And my First born got 4 aggregates. Now at Kings College Budo. Thumbs up to the staff, pupils and parents of Sir Apollo schools.

reviews.name: KWAGZY BREEZY
reviews.text: Sir Apollo molds what a parent wants his/her child to be cause their motto is they enable the future. Currently most of the head-prefects in these first class secondary schools are former Sir Apollo Students.

reviews.name: CHARITY BYARUBAGA
reviews.text: Sir Apollo Kaggwa P/S Mengo has set a great Academic Pace in Central Region…….it has not compromised our expectations…..BIG UP's for the Administration team and teaching staff!!!
